name: Planet 13 Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a vertically integrated cultivator and provider of cannabis and cannabis-infused products in the States of Nevada and California, with retail cannabis operations in Illinois. In addition to these operational cannabis licenses, we hold a licenseand are developing operations in Florida.
